rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.053, which governs interagency cooperation for school-community guidance centers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each governmental agency that is concerned with children and that has jurisdiction in the school district shall cooperate with the school-community guidance centers on the request of the superintendent of the district
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
